task_description: Convert the game map from a responsive/percentage-based layout to a fixed-resolution (1200x900px) canvas inside a clipped viewport with click-and-drag panning. All map elements (background image, SVG routes, region cards) use absolute pixel positioning inside the fixed canvas and move together when panning.

verification.summary: TypeScript compilation and Vite production build both pass after review fixes. No test framework in project so test quality is not applicable. Review issues (touch support, pan bounds, initial centering, drag edge case) all addressed.
